name: ЧЕРТА
description: Однопальцевая боевая каллиграфия: три рывка оставляют линии, которые прорезают арену.
changelog: Moved gesture start handling to the window capture phase so shared mobile runtime handlers cannot intercept it first.
Kept native iOS Touch Events and a three-swipe buffer across dash and detonation animations.
Forced a fresh offline cache so previously installed 1.1.1 builds cannot retain the older input script.
